name: Tvardi Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Tvardi Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing oral small molecule inhibitors targeting STAT3 for inflammatory and proliferative diseases. Its pipeline includes TTI-101 (Phase 1b/2 in hepatocellular carcinoma) and TTI-109 (a prodrug of TTI-101, Phase 1 in healthy volunteers). The company has no approved products and has not generated any revenue.
sellsTo: patients with other inflammatory and proliferative diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of novel, oral, small molecule therapies targeting Signal Transducer and Activator of Transcription 3 (STAT3) to treat inflammatory and proliferative diseases with significant unmet need.

catalysts.event: Topline data from TTI-109 Phase 1 trial in healthy volunteers
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline data from this trial in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from REVERT LIVER CANCER Phase 1b/2 trial of TTI-101 in HCC
catalysts.sentence: We have extended the timing of the anticipated data readout from the first half of 2026 to the second half of 2026 in order to allow the data to mature.
